title: stegania procera
intro: Stegania procera, also known as 'Large Eyed' or 'Procera', is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Greece and Turkey, and its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Stegania procera are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting the body from oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Stegania procera include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
